title: Oral Surgeons' Toolkit: 8 Herbal Tinctures for Gum Pain Relief
description: Aloe vera tinctures may help with gum pain due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The tincture contains a compound called aloin, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and fight off bacteria that can cause gum infections. Aloe vera also contains vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium and potassium, which can help soothe and protect the gums.  If you're experiencing gum pain, try using aloe vera tincture as a mouthwash. Swish the tincture around ...
